headline: FDA Accepts RVMD's Filing for Daraxonrasib in Pancreatic Cancer
summary: Revolution Medicines' FDA filing for daraxonrasib in metastatic pancreatic cancer enters an accelerated review program, bringing its first commercial product closer.

headline: Bristol Myers Squibb (BMY) Reports Next Week: Wall Street Expects Earnings Growth
summary: Bristol Myers (BMY) possesses the right combination of the two key ingredients for a likely earnings beat in its upcoming report. Get prepared with the key expectations.
